attributes.what: AI-native prediction market with 80 agents trading Super Bowl LX predictions
attributes.agents: 4 frontier model families (GPT, Claude, Gemini variants)
attributes.mechanism: Constant product AMM (x*y=k), play-money AGP currency
attributes.result: Agent forecasts match Vegas lines; diversity improves accuracy
attributes.relevance_to_wavewarz: Demonstrates agent forecasting at scale; WaveWarZ could use similar model-diversity patterns for judge agents

attributes.what: Permissionless agent prediction market across 5 chains
attributes.relevance_to_wavewarz: Multi-chain agent architecture; Solana integration; agent-native market creation pattern

attributes.what: Frontier model (GPT-5.4, Claude 4.6 Opus, Gemini 3.1 Pro) trading on Kalshi + Polymarket
cohorts: Cohort 2: 4 next-gen models, paper trading from Mar 6
attributes.execution_cycle: 15-45 min trading cycles, web search tools, market discovery, Kelly Criterion sizing
attributes.findings: Frontier beats legacy on Polymarket; smarter agents more profitable; feedback worsens calibration (surprising)
attributes.relevance_to_wavewarz: Demonstrates frontier model trading viability; Kelly Criterion sizing pattern for agent position management

attributes.mechanism: Confidence-weighted Bayesian aggregation, KL divergence misprice detection, quarter-Kelly sizing
attributes.innovation: Latency arbitrage (200ms window on Polygon), agents reason about OTHER agents' knowledge via price observation
attributes.finding: Swarm aggregation > single-model; simple prompting ineffective for complex info
attributes.relevance_to_wavewarz: Multi-agent reasoning pattern; agent-vs-agent dynamics applicable to agentic battles

attributes.what: Full-stack autonomous agent execution platform (sentiment, routing, risk, execution)
attributes.backend: OpenClaw automation, Nodepay sentiment, x402 payment protocol on XRP
attributes.relevance_to_wavewarz: Continuous autonomous operation pattern; x402 payment integration (same as ZABAL Games judge agents); sentiment-driven signal aggregation

attributes.what: Economic accountability for evaluation (artist agent + judge agent + x402 payment)
attributes.payment: x402 HTTP 402 status → KES/USD → verdict delivery
attributes.innovation: Culture becomes tradeable, compensable asset; judge economically incentivized
attributes.relevance_to_wavewarz: Direct pattern for WaveWarZ judge agents (Doc 720 Decision #7): agent reads build, scores rubric, gets paid in x402

attributes.what: Multiple independent judges (Curator vs Maestro) evaluating same art with different criteria
attributes.execution: 3 AI artists post autonomously → 2 judges evaluate independently → x402 micropayments (0.009 ETH/decision)
attributes.full_pipeline: 8-agent flow (intake → enrichment → upscaling → metadata → hash seal → archive → NFT mint → verify)
attributes.verification: C2PA certification, perceptual hash registry, Arweave permanent storage
attributes.relevance_to_wavewarz: Parallel-judge-with-different-rubrics pattern; reasoning visibility; x402 integration; battle result appeals (different judges = different outcomes possible)

attributes.what: Task bounties with autonomous LLM judging and instant settlement
attributes.flow: Task poster escrows OKB → AI agents compete → LLM judges on-chain → instant payout to winner
roadmap: V3: DeFi strategy auction + stake-weighted judges
attributes.relevance_to_wavewarz: Immediate settlement pattern; reputation scoring for repeated judge agents; stakes-based judging (Respect-holders judge + earn from pool)
